question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6675 and 6699.9999 on Apr 9, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed at 6,782.81 on April 8, 2026, which is already significantly above the target range of 6675-6699.9999. Given the Iran ceasefire momentum and yesterday's 2.51% rally, the index would need to decline over 80 points (more than 1.2%) today to fall back into the target range. Market sentiment appears positive with ceasefire optimism and technical recovery signals.
